title: ヴィクトリアマイルの後に・先輩

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to produce a great result in the Victoria
Mile!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And it turns out Sweep was actually worried
about me, despite all the harsh things she said.
Seeing a smile on Sweep's face makes me happy
too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... It's thanks to you that I made it this far,
despite all the doubts I struggled with along the
way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
You're the ultimate partner! Let's become
Legendary Princess and Legendary Trainer from
Princess Fighter together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next is the Takarazuka Kinen! I'm ready to run
wild! Howl, Princess☆Buster!
